_comment: Copy to tests/real-machine-hosts.json (gitignored) and fill in. Used by tests/real-machine-test.ps1.
_comment_snapshot: Optional per host: set snapshot:true + vm_name to checkpoint a Hyper-V guest before the run and revert it after. Runs are hermetic so this is opt-in belt-and-suspenders; omit it (e.g. a physical Mac) to just run the tests. Requires Hyper-V cmdlets on the control box.
